data.content:
Implementation complete.

Branch: worktree-knots-03c9-doctor-progress
Commit: 5b695f45461a15f19eaaf227bcdf8a86442c3478

Changes:
- `kno doctor --fix` now emits per-operation progress lines via the
  existing `ProgressReporter` trait and `StdoutProgressReporter`:
    • `Running diagnostics...` before the initial checks run
    • `Fixing <check>...` for each non-pass check as its fix starts
    • `Syncing fix events...` when the event log was touched
    • `N issue(s) fixed.` or `No issues found.` as the final summary
- Plain `kno doctor` (no --fix) and `--json` mode are unchanged: the
  reporter is only instantiated when both `args.fix` and `!args.json`
  are true, so JSON output stays clean.
- Extracted `doctor_fix::announce_and_apply_fixes` to keep doctor.rs
  small and to give tests a pure entry point for the Git vs local-only
  branch and the no-issues-found path.
- New tests:
    • `apply_fixes_with_progress_emits_line_per_non_pass_check`
    • `apply_fixes_with_progress_none_matches_silent_apply_fixes`
    • `run_doctor_with_fix_progress_is_silent_when_fix_false`
    • `run_doctor_with_fix_progress_announces_diagnostics_then_per_fix_and_summary`
    • `announce_and_apply_fixes_reports_no_issues_when_all_checks_pass`
    • `announce_and_apply_fixes_local_only_reports_count_without_fixing`

Verification:
- `make sanity` green: 1102 tests pass, coverage 95.11% (+0.02%).
- Manually ran the release binary in this worktree: first output
  ("Running diagnostics...") appears immediately, followed by a fix
  line per non-pass check and the final summary — satisfies acceptance
  criteria 1–6.
- `kno doctor` without `--fix` and `kno doctor --fix --json` verified
  to produce no new progress output.
